name: KLR Roofing Corp.
partnership_strategy: SB 808 angle - dispute substandard inspections; PA protects scope
notes: State certified FL roofing contractor; CCC1328862; 15+ years experience. Founder-run = faster partnership decisions. Premium market pricing. Pitch: protect customer scope from low-ball carrier-accepted inspections before July 1 SB 808 deadline.

name: All Phase Construction USA
partnership_strategy: Active expansion = openness to partnerships; multi-trade crew = broad claim exposure
column9: Expanding roofing operations in Deerfield Beach; growth-mode contractor. Multi-trade (roof+plumber+HVAC) = every major claim type. Pitch: referral exchange - All Phase refers disputed insurance scopes, Duncan handles settlement.

name: Quantum Roofing Solutions
partnership_strategy: Commercial + residential dual track; Miami-Dade volume + commercial upside
column9: Large-scale residential + commercial roofing; storm-prep market positioning. Miami-Dade is hottest county (+6.6% YoY). Sales Manager contact = relationship builder. Pitch: priority handling for transferred Citizens policies homeowners.

name: Storm Shield Roofing
partnership_strategy: High-value claims alignment; specialized expertise = client confidence
notes: Specializes in Category 5 rated systems; premium roofs ($30K-$60K+). Labor-constrained but high-value deals. Pitch: premium clients investing in storm-rated roofs want insurance protection at that level. PA ensures settlement matches system value.

name: Coastal Property Management Group
column9: Manages 200+ residential properties - largest portfolio in CRM. VP Business Development = partnership responsibility. Broward has most active insurance rate changes. Pitch: one PA on call for claim disputes across entire portfolio.

name: Prestige Realty Management
partnership_strategy: Luxury claims specialist; $2M+ properties = highest claim values
column9: Premium property manager handling luxury segment (avg $2M+). CEO contact = decision made in one call. Miami-Dade strongest market (+6.6% YoY; $5M+ up 27%). Pitch: high-value finishes + complex coverage = PA brings sophistication luxury clients deserve.

name: Atlantic Water & Mold Solutions
partnership_strategy: Pre-scope coordination - PA ensures insurance math works before final scope
expected_roi: 2-4 active job referrals/month at $18K-$45K; PA fee $2
column9: Post-storm capacity often maxed; April rainfall 3x normal. Sales Director = partnership-measured. Palm Beach premium market. Highest urgency this week. Pitch: 'Make current work actually pay out' - PA in loop before carrier scope decision prevents payment gaps.

name: Elite General Contracting
partnership_strategy: Claims triage partnership - alert PA to insurance friction situations
column9: Multi-trade (roof+plumber+HVAC). Drought-to-wet sequence = water/slow-leak claims now. Broward active market. Pitch: insurance friction early alert = Duncan handles coverage fight while Elite focuses on repair.

name: SafeHaven Property Consulting
partnership_strategy: Emerging market - early-adopter advantage; less saturated than Broward/Miami
notes: St. Lucie #1 mid-size housing market growth. Early PA relationships = market positioning advantage. Less competition than Broward/Miami. Principal contact = decision maker. Future growth track.

name: Florida Insurance Partners LLC
partnership_strategy: Mutual referral - PA handles pre-litigation; attorney handles bad-faith escalations
column9: P&C insurance litigation specialty - exact PA/attorney overlap. Managing Partner = decision maker. Miami-Dade highest litigation activity. HB 459 administrative dispute path = PA + attorney co-pilot model. Pitch: mutual referral - resolve administratively first, escalate to counsel only if needed.

name: HOA Advocates Management
partnership_strategy: Association-level claims advocacy; 45+ communities = 45 claim sources
expected_roi: Even 5% generating 1 claim/year = 20+/month; avg $15K-$60K; PA fee $2
column9: Manages 45+ communities. Executive Director = right level. Palm Beach civil litigation surge = communities in disputes. Pitch: be hero who solved resident complaint. White-labeled 'Claims Guide for HOA Residents' distributed to all 45+ communities = brand presence.

name: Mold Only
partnership_strategy: Causation argument specialist - 'I make mold claims stick.' Pre-existing denial defense.
expected_roi: 2-3/month specialty claims at $10K-$30K; high denial rate = high PA value; PA fee $1
column9: Specialty-only remediator at capacity from April rainfall surge (3x normal). Can't pivot to other work if mold claim denied as pre-existing. April 25 trend analysis cited. Pitch: 'Mold claims hardest-fought by carriers - you do remediation whether insurance cooperates. I handle causation chain.' Contact: Operations or Sales to identify.

name: Pure Maintenance of South Florida
partnership_strategy: Franchise owner angle: 'I help you not get squeezed between corporate scope + carrier payout.' Reduce remediation cost gap.
expected_roi: 1-3/month depending on franchise size at $15K-$35K; PA fee $2
column9: Franchise operation cited in April 25 trend analysis. Franchises have corporate protocols but owner-operator motivations. Owner-responsive to margin protection partners. Pitch: 'Your standards are right; carriers calibrate low. PA closes the gap.' Contact: franchise owner or operations manager (research needed).

name: R.E. Mold
partnership_strategy: Treasure Coast first-mover - establish referral relationships before PA competition saturates. Market expansion.
expected_roi: 1-2/month initially growing with Treasure Coast presence at $12K-$25K; PA fee $1
column9: Serves Treasure Coast (Martin/St. Lucie). Most PA activity concentrated in Miami-Dade/Broward = less competition. St. Lucie #1 mid-size housing market. Pitch: 'Treasure Coast growing, PA relationships still concentrated south. Establish referral here first.' Contact: Research needed - website/contact info TBD.

name: FP Property Restoration
partnership_strategy: Full-claim partnership - complete restoration (water+structural+contents) = biggest PA impact. $40K-$80K+ claims.
expected_roi: 1-2/month but high-value claims at $40K-$100K+; PA fee $6K-$20K
notes: Full-service restoration sees complete claim picture. Multi-trade gap (what carrier pays vs. what job costs) can be $20K-$40K. Broward/Palm Beach multi-county. Pitch: 'Full restoration jobs = biggest difference. Gap between insurance offer + actual cost can be $20K-$40K. I handle the claim math.' Contact: Operations or Project Manager (research needed).

name: Merlin Law Group
partnership_strategy: Pre-litigation feeder - Merlin screens cases; Duncan handles pre-litigation stage. Escalate to Merlin if needed. High-value access.
expected_roi: Even 1-2 referrals/quarter would be transformational at $50K-$500K+; PA fee $15K-$100K+
notes: Florida's premier P&C plaintiff firm (Fort Lauderdale/Miami offices). Handles highest-value insurance litigation in state. April 28 brief: Hurricane Milton supplemental claims deadlines. Access to cases Merlin screens out = pre-litigation feeder lane. Pitch: 'You're selective about cases - many disputes better served with PA first 60-90 days. Send pre-litigation work my way; I'll escalate what needs counsel.'

name: State Farm Agents - South Florida Network
partnership_strategy: Client retention referral - when State Farm client has claim dispute, agent refers to Duncan. Protects agent relationship.
expected_roi: 1-3 referrals/month per top agent (300+ book) at $20K-$50K; PA fee $3K-$10K
notes: Cheapest carrier in Florida ($4,654 avg). Largest market share in rate-competitive environment. Depopulated policy owners = confused about new coverage. Rate relief conversations = opening to intro PA referral network. Pitch: 'Protect your renewals - when clients have claim disputes, you want a name. I'm it.' Contact: Research top 3 State Farm agents per county (book size 300+).

name: Independent P&C Brokers - Palm Beach Luxury
partnership_strategy: High-value claims partnership - position as 'claims specialist' of broker's advisor team. $3M-$10M properties.
expected_roi: 1-2/month but transformational values; PA fee on $150K+ claim = $22
column9: Palm Beach luxury segment accelerating (+44.20% dollar volume YoY). Broker = gatekeeper. High-net-worth positioning = full-service advisors. One referral could be $100K+ claim. Pitch: 'Your clients insure $3M-$10M. Gap between carrier offer + actual property value can be hundreds of thousands. I handle complex high-value residential claims.' Contact: Research brokers specializing in $1M+ homes - 'high-value home insurance' specialists.
